mapper.select: select id, class_code, class_name, grade_name, teacher_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted from class_info where deleted = 0 order by id asc
select id, class_code, class_name, grade_name, teacher_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted from class_info where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select id, class_code, class_name, grade_name, teacher_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted from class_info where class_code = #{classCode} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into class_info(class_code, class_name, grade_name, teacher_id, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{classCode}, #{className}, #{gradeName}, #{teacherId}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update class_info set class_code = #{classCode}, class_name = #{className}, grade_name = #{gradeName}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update class_info set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
